channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole, 11th March
item.description:
Outside #89
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Melville Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes, 11th March
item.description:
Around area by salt bin on roundabout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Melville Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury

item.title: Sign rotating in wind giving confusing directions, 11th March
item.description:
On Evesham road adjacent to racecourse roundabout

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Abandoned car, 11th March
item.description:
Abandoned car been there a year all moody inside

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Hudson Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous pot hole in the road, 11th March
item.description:
Outside 114 Greenhills road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Greenhills Road, Cheltenham

item.title: Pothole in the road. One of many nearby., 11th March
item.description:
In the road by the entrance to Charlton Kings Nursing home. There are a few in this area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moorend Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Station Road, 11th March
item.description:
Flags unlawfully tied to lampposts/ too high for anyone to remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Two Hedges Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flags unlawfully tied to lampposts, 11th March
item.description:
Flags erected on lampposts all along Two Hedges Rd - need to be taken down please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Two Hedges Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flags attached unlawfully, 11th March
item.description:
Flags unlawfully tied to lampposts all down Britannia Way, Two Hedges Road & Station Road - please can these be removed with immediate effect
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Britannia Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 11th March
item.description:
Series of potholes
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole close to a street lamp, 11th March
item.description:
Outside 7 Farmington Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Farmington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree limb and branches, in narrow section of road, 11th March
item.description:
Opposite Trumans cottage, overhanging tree has caused damage to our refuse truck bending rear light and camera bracket. Due to damage to 26t vehicle, there could be damage to branch, creating a risk of falling and causing incident or injury. Please check and cut back where possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Lane, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 11th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day temporary footway closure please lift and relay x1 sunken 600x600x21mm number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 11th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day temporary footway closure please lift and replace broken x2 rocking 600x600x20mm number 1 (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 11th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day temporary footway closure aburt level difference 600x200x20mm number 1 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
